allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(p.get\(''''version''''\)\); print\(p.get\(''''main''''\) or p.get\(''''exports'''',{}\)\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''''''''; process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{ const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({next:p.dependencies?.next,react:p.dependencies?.react},null,2\)\); }\)")
